prompts.prompt: loose expressive hand-drawn fantasy character-sheet portrait, bust / head and shoulders, mostly 3/4 view, slightly exaggerated cartoony-but-grounded proportions — strong jawline, prominent nose, distinctive characterful eyebrows, very readable facial expression; confident sketchy inklines with visible construction lines and varied line weight; soft slightly-desaturated cel-shading (one mid-tone, one darker shadow, one lighter highlight), simple consistent top-left directional light; flat plain white background, no scenery, no props; illustrated fantasy-novel / tabletop-RPG concept lineup art. Subject: Fíli, a aged and seasoned Dwarf of Durin's kind, of the Durin's Folk; broad strong-boned face, thick brows, full braided beard (if male), deep-set eyes; a characterful, dignified expression. Head and shoulders only, 3/4 view, plain white background.

prompts.prompt: loose expressive hand-drawn fantasy character-sheet portrait, bust / head and shoulders, mostly 3/4 view, slightly exaggerated cartoony-but-grounded proportions — strong jawline, prominent nose, distinctive characterful eyebrows, very readable facial expression; confident sketchy inklines with visible construction lines and varied line weight; soft slightly-desaturated cel-shading (one mid-tone, one darker shadow, one lighter highlight), simple consistent top-left directional light; flat plain white background, no scenery, no props; illustrated fantasy-novel / tabletop-RPG concept lineup art. Subject: Esmeralda Took, a Hobbit of the Shire, of the Took; round rosy face, curly hair, no beard, bright kind eyes, slightly pointed ears; a warm, cheerful, homely expression. Head and shoulders only, 3/4 view, plain white background.
